name: Beef Bourguignon
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the beef in 1/3 of the brandy and red wine for at least 1 hour, turning occasionally.
2. In a large heavy skillet, heat half the butter until foamy.
3. Mix together flour with salt and pepper to taste. Roll the beef cubes in flour, then place them in hot butter and brown, removing cubes as they are done.
4. In a separate skillet, heat the remaining butter; add onions; stir, cover, and simmer over low heat for 2 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and turn up the heat, sautéing for 3 minutes. Remove from heat.
6. Add tomato paste, garlic, and 1 tablespoon flour to the skillet. Mix until smooth.
7. Add the remaining brandy, red wine, beef stock, bay leaf, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste. Boil briefly, then reduce heat.
8. Simmer for 15 minutes. Add the beef and simmer for an additional 1 1/2 hours.
